questions.question: What are the major sources of air pollution and their impacts on human health? Discuss the preventive measures to mitigate these impacts. (15 marks)
Describe the effects of noise pollution on human health and the environment. What are the sources of noise pollution and how can they be controlled? (12 marks)
List the major sources of water pollution and their impacts on aquatic life and human health. What are the preventive measures to control these sources and mitigate the impacts? (15 marks)
